title: [MTR4] Ecitaro 3 Door Conversion
description:
This resource pack adds a custom 3-door Mercedes-Benz eCitaro variant, edited and modified by me for improved realism and better compatibility.

The original eCitaro model was created by NonPlayerCharacter.
body:
Edited for European 3-door operations using the original Mercedes-Benz eCitaro model by NonPlayerCharacter. This version is adapted for realistic 3-door configurations used in modern European city transport, improving realism and compatibility for in-game transit setups.

Original pack: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/npcs-electric-bus-pack
